title: [CI:DOCS] markdown-preprocess: add generic include mechanism
body:
"It'll be easy", they said.

This is a two-commit PR: one of them simple and easy to review, the other one
completely bonkers. Please see individual commits. Seriously, you cannot review
this monster as one commit. And please see the warning about nroff. That needs
to be addressed before we can even think of merging this, so I'm marking Draft.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
generic md-include mechanism, to embed kubernetes_support.md into podman-kube-play man page
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Oh, yeah, the other thing:  have no idea if I inserted the `@@include` in the right place.

I just ran this patch locally, and the man page looks pretty good on my gnome terminal.

LGTM

Less nice on xterm but not horrible.
![Screenshot from 2022-10-14 09-11-17](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2000835/195855374-1d9dc35a-1df5-4317-af71-bb525bb5868d.png)
Looks good on terminator as well.  Now I need to get out my VT100.  :^)

>The source .md file has UTF8 checkmarks, and nroff is not happy with those: the generated man pages are gross.

Turned out to be my `lesspipe.sh`. Using the fedora one, or updating my copy to use `man -l`, produces nice-looking checkmarks. I've removed the WIP flag. If people are happy with this, or at least happy enough for the moment, it's ready to merge.
